createaddonorganizer.configuration.title: Create: Addon Organizer
createaddonorganizer.configuration.absor: Which addon creative tabs get folded into the Create tab, and which Create tab each one goes to.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.force: Tab IDs to always absorb under the Create tab, even if their mod doesn't declare a Create dependency. Example: somemod:main
Tab IDs to never absorb — these mods keep their own standalone creative tab. Example: somemod:main
createaddonorganizer.configuration.route: Send specific addon tabs to a different Create parent tab instead of the main one. Format: "<addonTab> > <parentTab>", e.g. "somemod:deco > create:palettes".
createaddonorganizer.configuration.appea: Banner, contrast-box, and title-text styling. Everything here is also editable visually from the banner editor.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.secti: Banner colors for individual sections, one "<tabId> = <hex>" entry each (e.g. "create:palettes = #6A8F3C"). Usually easier to edit from the banner editor.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.banne: Banner images for individual sections — an image overrides the section's color. Managed by the banner editor (Image mode).
createaddonorganizer.configuration.anima: Marks a banner texture as an animated frame strip and sets its speed in game ticks. Managed by the banner editor's "Animated" checkbox and speed slider.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.fetch: Checks online once per game launch for new or updated community banners and credits. Turn off to stay fully offline; already-downloaded banners keep working either way.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.banne: Where the online banner list is fetched from. Only used while Fetch Online Banners is on.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.tinte: Draw a tinted contrast box behind each section title, so the text stays readable on any banner.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.boxCo: Contrast-box colors for individual sections, one "<tabId> = <hex>" entry each. The alpha channel controls opacity, e.g. "#AA39231C".
createaddonorganizer.configuration.boxTe: Text banner (contrast box) images for individual sections — an image overrides the section's box color. Managed by the box editor (Image mode).
createaddonorganizer.configuration.fetch: Checks online once per game launch for new or updated community text-banner (contrast box) textures. Turn off to stay fully offline; already-downloaded ones keep working either way.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.boxMa: Where the online text-banner list is fetched from. Only used while Fetch Online Text Banners is on.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.textC: Title text colors for individual sections, one "<tabId> = <hex>" entry each.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.twoTo: Shade section titles two-tone: the primary color on top of each glyph and the secondary color along the bottom, for an embossed look.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.showC: Show Fancy Tab Sections' built-in collapse/expand button on the right side of each section banner. Off by default since this mod's own banners aren't designed for it.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.textS: Secondary (bottom shade) title colors for individual sections. Only used while Two-Tone Shaded Text is on.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.highl: Optional accent color for main tabs only, one "<tabId> = <hex>" entry each. Tints that tab's row and its sub-section group line in the section list screen, for color-coding groups. Has no effect in-game. Managed by the "Highlight Color..." button in the section list's editor.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.organ: Custom section ordering and renames, as saved by the section list screen.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.secti: The saved order of sections within each parent tab. Managed by dragging rows in the section list; sections not listed here append alphabetically.
Custom display names for sections, one "<tabId> = <name>" entry each. Managed by Ctrl+Clicking a row in the section list.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.inter: The collapsible section-index jump list on the left of the creative screen.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.index: Visual style of the section-index jump list: Vanilla, Dark, Refurbished (Refurbished Furniture look), or Backport (Vanilla Backport look).
createaddonorganizer.configuration.edito: Set automatically after you first click a part of the banner preview in the editor. Turn this off to see the pulsing hint again.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.banne: Where the clickable banner preview sits in the banner editor: on top directly under the title, or at the bottom just above the OK/Cancel buttons.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.gradi: Chunkiness (in GUI pixels) of the hue/saturation/value picker gradients in the banner editor. 1 is a smooth gradient; higher values look blockier/more pixel-art.
createaddonorganizer.banner.noneForAddon: There are no banners for this addon.
createaddonorganizer.banner.delete.title: Delete this banner?
createaddonorganizer.banner.delete.messa: This permanently removes the uploaded image %s. Any section still using it will fall back to a plain colour next time it's rebuilt.
createaddonorganizer.box.delete.title: Delete this box texture?
createaddonorganizer.box.delete.message: This permanently removes the uploaded image %s. Any section still using it will fall back to a plain colour next time it's rebuilt.
createaddonorganizer.banner.screenshot.s: Banner screenshot saved (path copied to clipboard)
createaddonorganizer.colors.title: Section Banner Colors
createaddonorganizer.colors.hint: Ctrl+Click to rename, Drag to reorder, "Edit" to change colors, Shift + Click to delete.
createaddonorganizer.colors.hint2: Click to select, Double-click or "Edit..." to restyle, Drag to reorder, Ctrl+Click to rename, Shift+Click to delete.
createaddonorganizer.configuration.class: Use the classic (pre-1.3) organizer menu: centered column, an Edit button on every row, no search box or selection panel.
createaddonorganizer.colors.simulatedUne: Create Simulated cannot be edited because it uses a different tab system. This may be changed in the future.
createaddonorganizer.colors.resetAll.mes: This resets every banner colour/image, box colour, text colour, section order, and tab placement (added/removed sections) back to default. This cannot be undone.
createaddonorganizer.colors.presets.desc: Presets can save Tab order, Color / images, Names, and tab placement.
createaddonorganizer.colors.presets.name: Name this preset
createaddonorganizer.colors.presets.appl: This replaces your current banner, box, and text colours/images, section order and names, and tab placement, with the preset's. This cannot be undone.
createaddonorganizer.colors.presets.save: Save Current Config to This Preset
createaddonorganizer.colors.presets.dele: This permanently deletes the preset "%s". This cannot be undone.
createaddonorganizer.colors.credits.desc: Thank you to everyone who has contributed banner artwork!
createaddonorganizer.colors.credits.cont: Want to Contribute art? Join the
createaddonorganizer.colors.credits.onli: Banners fetch from online, so check this page often! You might see new banners for you to use.
createaddonorganizer.colors.textBannerCr: Thank you to everyone who has contributed text banner artwork!
Text banners fetch from online, so check this page often! You might see new text banners for you to use.
createaddonorganizer.colors.highlight.en: Custom highlight color for this tab
createaddonorganizer.colors.unsaved.mess: You have unsaved section order changes.
createaddonorganizer.rename.hint: Leave blank to reset to the default name
createaddonorganizer.addsection.title: Add a Section
createaddonorganizer.bannerAssign.title: Assign Mod Banners
createaddonorganizer.bannerAssign.descri: Dev-only: curate which banners a mod's tab offers, even if it's not installed right now.
createaddonorganizer.bannerPool.title: Banner Pool — %s
createaddonorganizer.bannerPool.descript: Click a banner to allow/disallow it. Empty = players see the full unrestricted gallery.
createaddonorganizer.colors.deleteMain.m: This removes "%s" as a main section. Its own tab returns to standalone, and any sections folded into it move back to their default tab. This cannot be undone.
createaddonorganizer.colors.deleteMain.b: This is one of Create's own tabs. Deleting it stops anything from being folded into it -- its own tab returns to plain vanilla, and anything that would otherwise land here (nothing else routes elsewhere) stays standalone instead. Undo later via "Reset All", a preset, or "All Settings".
createaddonorganizer.devmode.title: Enter Code
createaddonorganizer.devmode.unauthorize: I dont know why you are here.
